_comment: S2 spike fixture manifest. PDF binaries are .gitignore'd (see scripts/spike/.gitignore). Operator drops fixtures in scripts/spike/fixtures/ before running pdf-outline-coverage.ts. Verify SHA-256 before use to detect bit-rot or wrong copy.

fixtures.name: outline-bearing-technical-book
fixtures.sha256: TODO: operator records SHA-256 after dropping the fixture
fixtures.sourceUrl: TODO: operator records source URL (e.g., a Manning/O'Reilly purchase or LeanPub free sample with TOC)
fixtures.notes: Technical book with publisher-grade table of contents. pdfjs-dist getOutline() should return a tree with depth>=1 entries that resolve via getDestination/getPageIndex.

fixtures.name: no-outline-scanned-book
fixtures.sha256: TODO: operator records SHA-256 after dropping the fixture
fixtures.sourceUrl: TODO: operator records source URL (e.g., a scanned PDF from archive.org)
fixtures.notes: Scanned PDF with no embedded outline. extractPdfOutline should return { ok: false, reason: "no_outline" } so the resolver falls through to PR #3430's too_many_pages bridge.
